_comment: Manual geocoding fallback for birth_city/birth_country pairs Nominatim couldn't resolve after geocode_birthplaces.py's automated pass (direct query + FALLBACK_PATTERNS qualifier-stripping) — same pattern as pipeline/birthplace_overrides.json, one level down the pipeline. Keyed by the exact 'City, Country' cache-query string (pipeline/geocode_cache.json's own keys). Only consulted when the automated pass has no result for that key; a later automated fix that resolves one of these directly wins (same only-fills-gaps semantics as birthplace_overrides.json). Each entry cites the real place identified and a source — never a guess presented as fact.

Nagrig, Egypt._note: Mohamed Salah's home village, Gharbia Governorate, near Basyoun. Coordinates from Nagrig's own Wikipedia infobox (30°58'21"N 30°52'01"E).

Kafr el-Dawwar, Egypt._note: Industrial city (~145k population) in Beheira Governorate — not the smaller same-named village in Kafr el-Sheikh Governorate. Marwan Attia's birthplace.

Wieringen, Netherlands._note: Former municipality / island in Noord-Holland (now part of Hollands Kroon) — Donyell Malen's birth_city is recorded at island granularity, not a specific town on it, so this is the island's own centroid.

Rosa Zárate, Ecuador._note: Urban parish that is the seat of Quinindé Canton, Esmeraldas Province — Willian Pacho's birthplace. Nominatim's plain-text search on 'Rosa Zárate' alone matches unrelated street segments elsewhere in Ecuador; resolved instead via the canton's more distinctive name 'Quinindé'.

Sallent de Llobregat, Spain._note: Joan García's birthplace — the town is officially just 'Sallent' (Bages comarca, Barcelona province); 'de Llobregat' is a common but non-official disambiguator (river the town sits on), which is why the plain-text Nominatim query for the exact scraped string failed.

Djibonker, Senegal._note: Village west of Ziguinchor, Lower Casamance — Nicolas Jackson's birthplace per Chelsea/Bayern's official profiles (his exact birthplace has some source disagreement with Banjul, Gambia, but this matches what wc2026_birthplaces.py's own scrape already recorded). Coordinates from Wikidata Q3032925.

Fuerte Apache, Argentina._note: Thiago Almada's home neighborhood (officially 'Ejército de los Andes'), in Ciudadela, Partido de Tres de Febrero, Buenos Aires Province — same neighborhood Carlos Tevez is also known for. Point is Ciudadela's own town centroid, the closest resolvable settlement.

Al-Ahsa Oasis, Saudi Arabia._note: Mohammed Al-Owais's birth_city names the oasis region, not a specific town within it — this is Hofuf (Al-Hofuf), the oasis's largest city and administrative center, as a best-effort proxy for the named region.

Jarkurghon, Uzbekistan._note: Eldor Shomurodov's birthplace — standard Uzbek Latin spelling 'Jarqo'rg'on', Surxondaryo Region; the scraped transliteration without apostrophes doesn't match Nominatim's indexed name directly.

Shorqorgon, Uzbekistan._note: Odiljon Hamrobekov's birthplace, Namangan Region — standard spelling 'Sho'rqo'rg'on'. Confirmed via Wikipedia (born 13 Feb 1996 in Shorqorgon, Namangan Region).

Ķürgontepa, Uzbekistan._note: Abdulla Abdullaev's birthplace — administrative center of Qo'rg'ontepa District, Andijan Region (scraped spelling has a corrupted diacritic: 'Ķ' for 'Q''). Confirmed via Wikipedia.

Sarab-e Yas, Iran._note: Alireza Beiranvand's birth village, Koregah-e Gharbi Rural District, Khorramabad County, Lorestan Province.

Villa monica alritmo, Paraguay._note: Shared by two players (Braian Ojeda, José Canale) — the scraped string looks corrupted/garbled, but both players are independently reported by multiple sources as born in Itaugua, Central Department, Paraguay, which strongly corroborates that identification despite the odd source string.

Hägerstens församling, Sweden._note: Viktor Gyökeres's birthplace — a Church of Sweden parish (försämling) corresponding to the Hägersten district of Stockholm.

Spånga-Kista församling, Sweden._note: Taha Ali's birthplace — a parish spanning the Spånga and Kista districts of Stockholm; point is Kista's own suburb centroid (Spånga alone has no clean standalone Nominatim match in Stockholm).

Spånga-Tensta city district, Sweden._note: Benjamin Tahirović's birthplace — Stockholm city district covering Spånga and Tensta; point is Tensta's own suburb centroid.

Norrköping Matteus church parish, Sweden._note: Ken Sema's birthplace — Matteus is a Church of Sweden parish within Norrköping; point is Norrköping city itself.

_known_unresolved._comment: Researched and deliberately left WITHOUT an override, rather than guessing — see each note.
_known_unresolved.Cape Verde, Cape Verde: Bubista's birth_city as scraped is literally the country name — no specific city is known, so this is left absent rather than guessing at the capital (Praia).
_known_unresolved.Curaçao, Netherlands: Tyrick Bodak's birth_city as scraped is literally the constituent country's name (Curaçao), not a specific city — same reasoning as Cape Verde above; not overridden to the capital (Willemstad) since that's a guess, not a sourced fact.
_known_unresolved.Corgi, Iraq: Mustafa Saadoon's own Wikipedia infobox says 'Corgi, Iraq' verbatim, and Wikidata's P19 only has country-level 'Iraq' with zero references. Arabic sources render it 'الكورجي' (Al-Kurji) — this may actually be a family/tribal-origin name (matches his own surname 'Al-Korji') rather than a distinct place, and one Arabic-language source ties his background to Al-Nahrawan instead. Insufficient confidence to assign coordinates to either candidate.
